summary: Comprehensive testing of incident and requirement order management system. Backend APIs fully functional (13/13 tests passed), frontend navigation and form functionality working well, but frontend document generation has JavaScript runtime errors preventing successful document download.

minor_issues.issue: Test uploads replaced original 297 affiliations, had to restore manually
minor_issues.impact: Testing artifact - original data restored successfully

integration_issues.issue: JavaScript runtime errors during document generation causing download timeout

passed_tests: Frontend page navigation (Nueva Orden, Documentos, Configuración)
Form affiliation autocomplete (municipio, direccion populate correctly)
Form input validation and required fields
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JavaScript runtime errors in frontend document generation. The backend API works perfectly but frontend has script errors preventing successful document download. Investigate bundle.js errors at lines 55209 and 55228, likely related to file download handling or form submission.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (navigation, forms, autocomplete working, document generation failing)
